spanish: El problema está en que no puedes aprender de memoria una lista enorme de números
english: The problem is that you can't memorize a huge list of numbers
explanation: Relative clause with está en que - expressing the nature/cause of the problem

spanish: Se recomienda dejar de usar esas DNS por defecto
english: It's recommended to stop using those default DNS
explanation: Impersonal se + subjunctive-triggering verb (recomienda) - expressing general recommendation

spanish: Aunque la descarga de la página vaya igual de rápido una vez que se inicia
english: Even if the page download goes just as fast once it starts
explanation: Concessive clause with aunque + subjunctive (vaya) + temporal clause (una vez que)
